_comment: Complementary bond prospectus data not available from BYMA API. Add entries as needed.

_format.couponDates: Array of 'MM-DD' strings representing coupon payment months/days
_format.amortSchedule: Array of { date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', pct: number } for each amortization payment
_format.couponsPerYear: Number of coupon payments per year (1, 2, 4)
_format.callable: Whether the bond is callable: true/false
